commands.small_overfit: conda run -n crystallm_env python model/New_model/symcif_experiment/scripts/run_mp20_minicfjoint_v2.py --stage small-overfit --small-overfit-samples 256 --small-overfit-epochs 1200 --batch-size 256 --hidden-dim 512 --emb-dim 160 --lr 0.001 --weight-decay 0.0 --eval-every 100 --device cuda --eval-workers 48
commands.gtwa_geometry: conda run -n crystallm_env python model/New_model/symcif_experiment/scripts/run_mp20_minicfjoint_v2.py --stage gtwa-geometry --geometry-epochs 25 --geometry-batch-size 512 --geometry-eval-batch-size 256 --geometry-hidden-dim 256 --geometry-emb-dim 64 --geometry-lr 0.002 --geometry-weight-decay 0.0001 --geometry-coord-weight 2.0 --geometry-eval-every 25 --device cpu --eval-workers 48
